api_coverage.detection_note: Contract URLs found but no operations parsed

examples.detection_note: No executable code blocks detected (102 data-only blocks found). Site may use non-standard code rendering that the auditor does not recognize, or all examples are in data formats (YAML/JSON).

top_findings: Link verification inconclusive for 395 URLs (auth/rate-limit/server block); these are excluded from broken-link counts.
Freshness visibility is weak: only 0.0% pages show last updated

analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of docs.llamaindex.ai covered 51 pages from 446 discovered URLs (100% crawl coverage within scope). Zero broken links confirmed across documentation and repository navigation. However, 395 links could not be verified due to authentication or rate-limiting (excluded from broken link counts). API reference coverage is complete at 100% (1 page detected), but example reliability is 0%, freshness metadata is absent on all pages, and SEO/geo issues affect 25% of content. Overall audit confidence stands at 63.5%.
strengths: Zero confirmed broken links in documentation or repository navigation
100% API reference coverage with successful detection (85% confidence)
Complete crawl coverage at 100% of in-scope pages
Clean internal link structure with no broken internal links
risks: 395 unverified external links create unknown link health exposure (authentication/rate-limit blocks prevented validation)
0% example reliability indicates no working code examples detected or validated
0% freshness coverage means no last-updated metadata visible to users, obscuring content currency
25% SEO/geo issue rate suggests significant discoverability and internationalization problems
Only 1 API page detected despite multi-project topology may indicate incomplete API documentation or detection gaps
Low overall confidence at 63.5% and links confidence at 25% limit audit certainty
Large gap between discovered pages (446) and crawled pages (51) suggests scope limitations or access restrictions

prioritized_actions.action: Implement last-updated timestamps on all documentation pages to address 0% freshness coverage
Audit and repair example code blocks to achieve measurable reliability above 0%
Resolve authentication/rate-limit issues blocking 395 external link verifications and establish monitoring
Fix SEO/geo issues affecting 25% of pages (meta descriptions, titles, language tags)
Investigate crawl gap (51 crawled vs 446 discovered) and expand API documentation coverage beyond 1 page

limitations: External audit cannot verify actual functionality of code examples in user runtime environments or dependency compatibility
395 unverified links may be functional but blocked by authentication, rate-limiting, or bot detection; manual verification required
Crawl limited to 51 of 446 discovered pages; findings do not cover 88.6% of discovered URL space
API coverage detection based on pattern matching; actual API completeness vs. codebase requires internal review
SEO/geo scoring cannot assess content quality, accuracy, or appropriateness for target markets
